title: Smooth Armor
description: This texture pack makes Minecraft armor look smoother!
body:
## ✨ Features

- Custom armor textures redesigned for a smoother, more PvP-focused look.

- Fully compatible with all vanilla armor sets.

- Works seamlessly with any resolution (16x by default).

- Ideal for medieval, fantasy, or clean-themed texture packs.

## ⚙️ Installation

1. Download the .zip file of the resource pack.

2. Move it to your resource pack folder: /.minecraft/resourcepacks/

3. Open Minecraft and enable the pack in the Resource Packs menu.

## 🧩 Compatibility

- Minecraft Versions: 1.21.2 and above (leather armor doesn’t work in versions below 1.21.2)
